passage_title: The impact of climate change on butterflies in Britain

sentences.sentence: According to conservationists, populations of around two thirds of butterfly species have declined in Britain over the past 40 years.
sentences.translation: 据自然保护人士称，在过去40年里，英国约三分之二蝴蝶物种的种群数量已经下降。

structure.text: According to conservationists
populations of around two thirds of butterfly species
have declined in Britain over the past 40 years

difficult_points: According to conservationists 表明信息来源，不是句子主干。
主语核心是 populations，后面的 of 短语说明是哪类种群。
have declined 使用现在完成时，强调过去40年的变化影响到现在。

sentences.sentence: If this trend continues, it might have unpredictable knock-on effects for other species in the ecosystem.
sentences.translation: 如果这一趋势继续下去，它可能会对生态系统中的其他物种产生不可预测的连锁影响。

structure.text: If this trend continues
it might have unpredictable knock-on effects
for other species in the ecosystem

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，说明后果发生的前提。
it 指代前一句蝴蝶种群下降这一趋势。
knock-on effects 指一个变化引发的后续连锁影响。

sentences.sentence: Butterfly eggs develop into caterpillars and these insects, which are the second stage in a new butterfly's life cycle, consume vast quantities of plant material, and in turn act as prey for birds as well as bats and other small mammals.
sentences.translation: 蝴蝶卵会发育成毛毛虫，而这些昆虫是新蝴蝶生命周期的第二阶段，它们会消耗大量植物材料，并继而成为鸟类以及蝙蝠和其他小型哺乳动物的猎物。

structure.text: Butterfly eggs develop into caterpillars
and these insects, which are the second stage in a new butterfly's life cycle, consume vast quantities of plant material
which are the second stage in a new butterfly's life cycle
and in turn act as prey for birds as well as bats and other small mammals

difficult_points: these insects 指代 caterpillars，而不是 butterfly eggs。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，解释毛毛虫在生命周期中的阶段。
in turn 表示承接关系：毛毛虫吃植物，同时又成为其他动物的食物。

sentences.sentence: Only by arming themselves with an understanding of why butterfly numbers are down can conservationists hope to halt or reverse the decline.
sentences.translation: 自然保护人士只有让自己掌握蝴蝶数量为何下降的理解，才有希望阻止或扭转这种下降。

structure.text: Only by arming themselves with an understanding of why butterfly numbers are down
why butterfly numbers are down
can conservationists hope to halt or reverse the decline
to halt or reverse the decline

difficult_points: Only by 位于句首引起部分倒装，所以助动词 can 放在主语 conservationists 前。
arming themselves with an understanding 表示“让自己具备理解”。
why 引导宾语从句，说明需要理解的具体问题。

expressions.meaning_zh: 让自己具备；用……武装自己

sentences.sentence: Butterflies prefer outdoor conditions to be "just right", which means neither too hot nor too cold.
sentences.translation: 蝴蝶喜欢户外条件“刚刚好”，也就是既不太热也不太冷。

structure.text: Butterflies
prefer outdoor conditions to be "just right"
which means neither too hot nor too cold
neither too hot nor too cold

difficult_points: prefer 后接“宾语 + 不定式”，表示希望户外条件处于某种状态。
which 指代前面的 just right，用来解释具体含义。
neither...nor... 连接两个否定条件：不太热也不太冷。

sentences.sentence: Under the conditions of climate change, the temperature at any given time in summer is generally getting warmer, leaving butterflies with the challenge of how to deal with this.
sentences.translation: 在气候变化条件下，夏季任一给定时间的气温总体上正在变暖，这给蝴蝶留下了如何应对这一情况的挑战。

structure.text: Under the conditions of climate change
the temperature at any given time in summer
is generally getting warmer
leaving butterflies with the challenge of how to deal with this
how to deal with this

difficult_points: at any given time in summer 修饰 temperature，强调夏季任一时间点。
is getting warmer 使用现在进行时，突出正在发展的趋势。
leaving... 是结果状语，说明变暖给蝴蝶造成的挑战。

sentences.sentence: One of the main ways in which species are ensuring conditions suit them is by changing the time of year at which they are active and reproduce.
sentences.translation: 物种确保环境条件适合自己的主要方式之一，就是改变它们一年中活动和繁殖的时间。

structure.text: One of the main ways in which species are ensuring conditions suit them
in which species are ensuring conditions suit them
is
by changing the time of year at which they are active and reproduce
at which they are active and reproduce

difficult_points: 主语是 One of the main ways，后面的 in which 从句修饰 ways。
conditions suit them 是省略 that 的宾语从句，作 ensuring 的宾语。
at which 引导定语从句，修饰 the time of year。

sentences.sentence: Scientists refer to the timing of such life cycle events as "phenology", so when an animal or plant starts to do something earlier in the year than it usually does, it is said to be "advancing its phenology".
sentences.translation: 科学家把这类生命周期事件的时间安排称为“物候”，因此当动物或植物在一年中比通常更早开始做某事时，就被称为“推进其物候”。

structure.text: Scientists refer to the timing of such life cycle events as "phenology"
so when an animal or plant starts to do something earlier in the year than it usually does
when an animal or plant starts to do something earlier in the year than it usually does
it is said to be "advancing its phenology"

difficult_points: refer to...as... 表示“把……称为……”。
so 后面包含 when 引导的时间状语从句和主句 it is said...。
it 指代前面动物或植物更早开始某事这一现象。

sentences.sentence: These advances have been observed already in a wide range of butterflies - indeed, most species are advancing their phenology to some extent.
sentences.translation: 这些提前现象已经在许多种蝴蝶中被观察到——事实上，大多数物种都在某种程度上推进自己的物候。

structure.text: These advances
have been observed already in a wide range of butterflies
indeed, most species are advancing their phenology to some extent
are advancing their phenology

difficult_points: These advances 指代前文 advancing its phenology 的现象。
have been observed 是现在完成时被动语态，表示已经被观察到。
破折号后的 indeed 补充并强化前半句的信息。

sentences.sentence: In Britain, as the average spring temperature has increased by roughly 0.5 °C over the past 20 years, species have advanced by between three days and a week on average, to keep in line with cooler temperatures.
sentences.translation: 在英国，由于过去20年春季平均气温大约上升了0.5摄氏度，物种平均提前了三天到一周，以便与较凉爽的温度保持一致。

structure.text: In Britain
as the average spring temperature has increased by roughly 0.5 °C over the past 20 years
species have advanced by between three days and a week on average
to keep in line with cooler temperatures

difficult_points: as 引导原因状语从句，说明物候提前的气候背景。
has increased by roughly 0.5 °C 中 by 表示变化幅度。
to keep in line with... 表示目的，即与较凉温度保持同步。

sentences.sentence: Is this a sign that butterflies are well equipped to cope with climate change, and readily adjust to new temperatures?
sentences.translation: 这是否表明蝴蝶有充分能力应对气候变化，并能轻松适应新的温度？

structure.text: Is this a sign
that butterflies are well equipped to cope with climate change, and readily adjust to new temperatures
are well equipped to cope with climate change
and readily adjust to new temperatures

difficult_points: that 引导同位语从句，解释 a sign 具体意味着什么。
well equipped to cope with 表示“具备充分能力应对”。
adjust 与 are equipped 在语义上并列，说明蝴蝶可能适应新温度。

sentences.sentence: Or are these populations under stress, being dragged along unwillingly by unnaturally fast changes?
sentences.translation: 还是说这些种群正处于压力之下，被异常快速的变化不情愿地拖着走？

structure.text: Or are these populations under stress
being dragged along unwillingly by unnaturally fast changes
by unnaturally fast changes

difficult_points: Or 引出与前一句相反的另一种可能解释。
under stress 表示处于压力状态。
being dragged along 是现在分词的被动形式，形象说明种群被变化迫使前移。

sentences.sentence: The answer is still unknown, but a new study is seeking to answer these questions.
sentences.translation: 答案仍然未知，但一项新研究正在试图回答这些问题。

structure.text: The answer is still unknown
but a new study is seeking to answer these questions
to answer these questions

difficult_points: but 连接“答案未知”和“研究正在寻找答案”两个信息。
is seeking to answer 使用现在进行时，强调研究正在进行。
these questions 指代前面两个连续疑问句提出的问题。

sentences.sentence: First, the researchers pulled together data from millions of records that had been submitted by butterfly enthusiasts - people who spend their free time observing the activities of different species.
sentences.translation: 首先，研究人员汇集了来自数百万条记录的数据，这些记录由蝴蝶爱好者提交——这些人把空闲时间用于观察不同物种的活动。

structure.text: First
the researchers pulled together data from millions of records
that had been submitted by butterfly enthusiasts
people who spend their free time observing the activities of different species
who spend their free time observing the activities of different species

difficult_points: pulled together 表示“汇集、整合”数据。
that had been submitted 是过去完成时被动语态，修饰 records。
破折号后的 people... 是 butterfly enthusiasts 的同位解释。

sentences.sentence: This provided information on 130 species of butterflies in Great Britain every year for a 20-year period.
sentences.translation: 这提供了英国130种蝴蝶在20年期间每年的相关信息。

structure.text: This
provided information on 130 species of butterflies
in Great Britain every year for a 20-year period

difficult_points: This 指代前一句汇集数百万条记录这件事。
information on 表示“关于……的信息”。
every year for a 20-year period 说明数据的年度连续性和时间跨度。

sentences.sentence: They then estimated the abundance and distribution of each species across this time, along with how far north in the country they had moved.
sentences.translation: 随后，他们估算了这段时间内每个物种的数量和分布，以及它们在英国向北移动了多远。

structure.text: They
then estimated the abundance and distribution of each species across this time
along with how far north in the country they had moved
how far north in the country they had moved

difficult_points: They 指代研究人员。
abundance and distribution 是并列宾语，分别指数量和分布。
how far north... 是嵌入式疑问结构，作 along with 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: The data also, crucially, allowed researchers to estimate subtle changes in what time of the year each species was changing into an adult butterfly.
sentences.translation: 关键的是，这些数据还让研究人员能够估算每个物种在一年中变成成蝶的时间所发生的细微变化。

structure.text: The data
also, crucially, allowed researchers to estimate subtle changes
in what time of the year each species was changing into an adult butterfly
what time of the year each species was changing into an adult butterfly

difficult_points: crucially 是插入语，强调这个数据用途非常关键。
allowed researchers to estimate 是“allow + 宾语 + 不定式”结构。
what time of the year... 是嵌入式疑问结构，说明变化发生在哪个时间点。

sentences.sentence: Analysing the trends in each variable, the researchers discovered that species with more flexible life cycles were more likely to be able to benefit from an earlier emergence driven by climate change.
sentences.translation: 在分析每个变量的趋势后，研究人员发现，生命周期更灵活的物种更有可能从气候变化驱动的较早出现中受益。

structure.text: Analysing the trends in each variable
the researchers discovered
that species with more flexible life cycles were more likely to be able to benefit from an earlier emergence driven by climate change
driven by climate change

difficult_points: Analysing... 是现在分词短语，说明 researchers 发现结论前的动作。
that 引导 discovered 的宾语从句，是句子的信息重点。
driven by climate change 修饰 an earlier emergence，说明较早出现的原因。

sentences.sentence: Some species are able to go from caterpillar to butterfly twice or more per year, so that the individual butterflies you see flying in the spring are the grandchildren or great-grandchildren of the individuals seen a year previously.
sentences.translation: 一些物种一年能够从毛毛虫变成蝴蝶两次或更多次，因此你在春天看到飞舞的个体蝴蝶，是一年前所见个体的孙代或曾孙代。

structure.text: Some species are able to go from caterpillar to butterfly twice or more per year
so that the individual butterflies you see flying in the spring are the grandchildren or great-grandchildren of the individuals seen a year previously
you see flying in the spring
seen a year previously

difficult_points: are able to go from caterpillar to butterfly 表示完成一次生命周期转换。
so that 引导结果状语从句，说明多代繁殖带来的结果。
you see flying in the spring 省略关系代词，修饰 the individual butterflies。

sentences.sentence: Among these species, researchers observed that those which have been advancing their phenology the most over the 20-year study period also had the most positive trends in abundance, distribution and northwards extent.
sentences.translation: 在这些物种中，研究人员观察到，在20年研究期内物候提前最多的那些物种，在数量、分布和向北扩展范围方面也呈现出最积极的趋势。

structure.text: Among these species
researchers observed
that those which have been advancing their phenology the most over the 20-year study period also had the most positive trends in abundance, distribution and northwards extent
which have been advancing their phenology the most over the 20-year study period

difficult_points: that 引导 observed 的宾语从句，承载研究发现。
those which... 指“那些……的物种”，which 从句限定 those。
the most positive trends 后的三个名词 abundance、distribution 和 northwards extent 并列。

sentences.sentence: For these species, such as Britain's tiniest butterfly, the dainty Small Blue, whose colonies are up to a hundred strong, some develop into butterflies early in spring, allowing their summer generations to complete another reproductive cycle by autumn so that more population growth occurs.
sentences.translation: 对于这些物种，例如英国最小的蝴蝶、精致的小蓝蝶，其群落可多达一百只左右，有些个体会在早春发育成蝴蝶，从而让它们的夏季世代在秋季前完成另一个繁殖周期，使种群进一步增长。

structure.text: For these species
such as Britain's tiniest butterfly, the dainty Small Blue
whose colonies are up to a hundred strong
some develop into butterflies early in spring
allowing their summer generations to complete another reproductive cycle by autumn so that more population growth occurs
so that more population growth occurs

difficult_points: such as... 插入举例，the dainty Small Blue 是 Britain's tiniest butterfly 的同位说明。
whose 引导定语从句，说明小蓝蝶群落的规模。
allowing... 是结果状语，后面 so that 进一步说明繁殖周期带来的种群增长。

sentences.sentence: Other species, however, are less flexible and restricted to a single reproductive cycle per year.
sentences.translation: 然而，其他物种灵活性较低，并且局限于每年一个繁殖周期。

structure.text: Other species
however
are less flexible and restricted to a single reproductive cycle per year
restricted to a single reproductive cycle per year

difficult_points: however 插入句中，表示与前面灵活物种形成转折。
are less flexible and restricted to... 是并列表语。
a single reproductive cycle per year 表示一年只有一个繁殖周期。

sentences.sentence: For these species, there was no evidence of any benefit to emerging earlier.
sentences.translation: 对于这些物种，没有证据表明更早出现会带来任何益处。

structure.text: For these species
there was no evidence
of any benefit to emerging earlier
emerging earlier

difficult_points: there was no evidence 是存在句，说明证据不存在。
of any benefit 修饰 evidence，说明没有哪类证据。
to emerging earlier 中 to 是介词，后接动名词 emerging。

sentences.sentence: Indeed, worryingly, it was found that the species in this group that specialise in very specific habitat types, often related to the caterpillar's preferred diet, actually tended to be most at harm from advancing phenology.
sentences.translation: 事实上，令人担忧的是，研究发现这一组中专门适应非常特定栖息地类型的物种，尤其是那些常与毛毛虫偏好食物相关的栖息地，实际上往往最容易受到物候提前的伤害。

structure.text: Indeed, worryingly
it was found
that the species in this group that specialise in very specific habitat types, often related to the caterpillar's preferred diet, actually tended to be most at harm from advancing phenology
that specialise in very specific habitat types
often related to the caterpillar's preferred diet

difficult_points: it was found 是被动表达，真正发现的内容由 that 从句给出。
第二个 that 修饰 the species，说明是哪类物种。
often related to... 是插入的过去分词短语，补充说明 habitat types。

sentences.sentence: The beautiful High Brown Fritillary, often described as Britain's most endangered butterfly, is in this group.
sentences.translation: 美丽的大豹蛱蝶常被描述为英国最濒危的蝴蝶，它就属于这一组。

structure.text: The beautiful High Brown Fritillary
often described as Britain's most endangered butterfly
is in this group

difficult_points: often described as... 是过去分词短语，补充说明这种蝴蝶的濒危地位。
Britain's most endangered butterfly 是补足语，说明 described as 的内容。
this group 指前文那些生命周期不灵活、较易受害的物种组。

sentences.sentence: It is found only in coppiced woodland and limestone pavement habitats.
sentences.translation: 它只见于萌生林地和石灰岩铺地栖息地。

structure.text: It
is found only in coppiced woodland and limestone pavement habitats
in coppiced woodland and limestone pavement habitats

difficult_points: It 指代前一句的 High Brown Fritillary。
is found 是被动表达，表示这种蝴蝶的分布地点。
only 限定分布范围，强调栖息地非常特定。

sentences.sentence: It is also a single-generation butterfly that has advanced its phenology.
sentences.translation: 它也是一种已经推进其物候的单世代蝴蝶。

structure.text: It
is also a single-generation butterfly
that has advanced its phenology

difficult_points: It 仍指 High Brown Fritillary。
single-generation butterfly 表示一年只有一个世代的蝴蝶。
that 引导定语从句，说明这种蝴蝶已经出现物候提前。

sentences.sentence: This suggests that climate change, while undoubtedly not the sole cause, might have played a part in the downfall of this species.
sentences.translation: 这表明，气候变化虽然无疑不是唯一原因，但可能在该物种的衰落中起了一定作用。

structure.text: This suggests
that climate change, while undoubtedly not the sole cause, might have played a part in the downfall of this species
while undoubtedly not the sole cause
might have played a part in the downfall of this species

difficult_points: This 指代前面对大豹蛱蝶栖息地、单世代和物候提前的观察。
while undoubtedly not the sole cause 是让步插入成分，避免把气候变化说成唯一原因。
might have played a part 使用情态动词完成式，表示对过去影响的谨慎推测。

sentences.sentence: All is not lost, however.
sentences.translation: 不过，并非一切都没有希望。

structure.text: All
is not lost
however

difficult_points: All is not lost 是固定表达，意思是“并非全无希望”。
however 放在句末，表示与前文悲观结论形成转折。
not 修饰 lost，整体强调仍有可能改善。

expressions.meaning_zh: 并非一切都完了；仍有希望

sentences.sentence: Many of Britain's single-generation species show the capacity, in continental Europe, to add a second generation in years that are sufficiently warm.
sentences.translation: 英国许多单世代物种在欧洲大陆显示出一种能力：在足够温暖的年份增加第二代。

structure.text: Many of Britain's single-generation species
show the capacity
in continental Europe
to add a second generation in years that are sufficiently warm
that are sufficiently warm

difficult_points: show the capacity to... 表示“显示出做某事的能力”。
in continental Europe 是插入位置状语，说明这种能力在哪里被观察到。
that are sufficiently warm 修饰 years，说明能增加第二代的年份条件。

sentences.sentence: Therefore, as the climate continues to warm, species like the Silver-studded Blue might be able to switch to multiple generations in the UK as well, and so begin to extract benefits from the additional warmth, potentially leading to population increases.
sentences.translation: 因此，随着气候继续变暖，像银斑蓝蝶这样的物种在英国也可能能够转向多世代繁殖，从而开始从额外的温暖中获益，并可能带来种群增长。

structure.text: Therefore
as the climate continues to warm
species like the Silver-studded Blue might be able to switch to multiple generations in the UK as well
and so begin to extract benefits from the additional warmth
potentially leading to population increases

difficult_points: as 引导时间状语从句，表示随着气候继续变暖。
might be able to 表示谨慎推测，而不是确定会发生。
potentially leading... 是结果状语，说明多世代繁殖可能带来的后果。

sentences.sentence: More immediately, conservationists can arm themselves with all this knowledge to spot the warning signs of species that may be at risk.
sentences.translation: 更直接地说，自然保护人士可以用所有这些知识武装自己，以发现可能处于风险中的物种的警示信号。

structure.text: More immediately
conservationists can arm themselves with all this knowledge
to spot the warning signs of species that may be at risk
that may be at risk

difficult_points: More immediately 表示从长期适应转到眼前可采取的行动。
arm themselves with all this knowledge 呼应前文，表示用知识帮助保护工作。
that may be at risk 修饰 species，说明哪些物种需要被识别。

sentences.sentence: The White Admiral of southern England, a much sought-after butterfly, experienced a significant increase in numbers from the 1920s but has shown a considerable decline in the past 20 years.
sentences.translation: 英格兰南部的白带蛱蝶是一种备受追捧的蝴蝶，它的数量从20世纪20年代起显著增加，但在过去20年里已显示出大幅下降。

structure.text: The White Admiral of southern England
a much sought-after butterfly
experienced a significant increase in numbers from the 1920s
but has shown a considerable decline in the past 20 years

difficult_points: a much sought-after butterfly 是同位语，补充说明 White Admiral 的受欢迎程度。
experienced 和 has shown 是转折关系，体现数量先升后降。
has shown 使用现在完成时，强调过去20年的下降与现在相关。

sentences.sentence: This may be because the caterpillar exists solely on a diet of a plant called honeysuckle.
sentences.translation: 这可能是因为这种毛毛虫只依靠一种叫作忍冬的植物为食。

structure.text: This may be
because the caterpillar exists solely on a diet of a plant called honeysuckle
called honeysuckle

difficult_points: This 指代前一句白带蛱蝶数量下降的现象。
because 引导原因状语从句，提出一种可能解释。
called honeysuckle 是过去分词短语，修饰 a plant。

expressions.text: exist solely on a diet of

sentences.sentence: But it is also likely to be due to climate change.
sentences.translation: 但这也很可能是由气候变化造成的。

structure.text: But it is also likely
to be due to climate change
due to climate change

difficult_points: But 引出另一种原因，与前一句食物依赖的解释并列或补充。
it 指代白带蛱蝶数量下降这一现象。
be due to 表示“由于……造成”，后接原因。
